name: Katie McGinty
subject: Stand with Sen. Heinrich and President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friends —

Senator Martin Heinrich has been leading the charge to urge President Obama to protect the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe's water and sacred sites, and now the Army Corps of Engineers has announced it will not issue the permit needed for the pipeline to be built.

Martin was a big help for my campaign, and that’s why I’m asking you to join him today and thank President Obama for taking action to halt the pipeline construction.

http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/thank-president-obama-dapl?source=mcginty

Thanks,

Katie McGinty

---Original message---
From: Sen. Martin Heinrich

Big news: This week, the Army Corps of Engineers announced it was not going to issue the permit needed for the pipeline to be built that threatened the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe's water supply and sacred sites.

President Obama has done the right thing and listened to all of our voices to protect this land and people.

Please, join me in thanking President Obama for his actions to halt the construction of the pipeline.

http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/thank-president-obama-dapl?source=mcginty

I am grateful for the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe's dedication. Despite extreme conditions and violence, they stood valiantly for their rights and their lands, and now claim victory for both.

I know that we will remain vigilant in fighting for what is right, and stand up for all our neighbors when it is needed.

Thank you for making your voice heard on this important issue.

http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/thank-president-obama-dapl?source=mcginty

Senator Martin Heinrich

P.S. Click here to thank President Obama for halting the pipeline construction and bringing about a peaceful solution for the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe.

http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/thank-president-obama-dapl?source=mcginty

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-4784988687555362816/2935528920394498048.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Democrats.org
subject: ✍ Add your name and get a note from POTUS:
body:
Where can President Obama send you a thank you note? The Democratic Party**President Obama wants to send you a short note to thank you for being part of everything we've accomplished these past eight years. Let us know where to send it:

**[HERE'S MY ADDRESS](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+HERES+MY+ADDRESS&utm_campaign=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1&source=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1")****
The President of the United States wants to send you a thank you note. Will you let us know where to send it?

**[http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+httpmydemocratsorgThankYouNote&utm_campaign=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1&source=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1")**

Thank you so much for being one of our most committed supporters.

The Democrats

\-------- Forwarded message -------
Sender: Barack Obama
Sent: Tue, Dec 6, 2016
Subject: re: thank you note

Friend --

Before I leave office, I'd like to send you something to make sure you know how grateful I am to have had you by my side over these past eight years.

**[What's the best place for me to send you a thank you note?](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Whats+the+best+place+for+me+to+send+you+&utm_campaign=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1&source=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1")**

I will always appreciate how you've stood by me to fight for the change we believed in, to celebrate remarkable victories -- and to face down insurmountable obstacles, too. You've been a part of everything we've achieved during my time in office, and I know you'll continue to stand with our party and the movement we've built together for the fights ahead.

I hope you know how proud I am of you.

Sign up today so I can send you a note to say thanks:

**[http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+httpmydemocratsorgThankYouNote&utm_campaign=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1&source=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1")**

Never forget what we did together.

Barack

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3c7/4067b0a/22255d3fb/7e07bd05/212567438/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1&source=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3c7/4067b0a/22255d3fb/7e07bd02/212567438/VEsB/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1&source=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3c7/4067b0a/22255d3fb/7e07bd03/212567438/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1&source=em_20161207_dnc_v4s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: A Thank You Card for 2 amazing senators
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76bc/24c69fd9/2cb283e/18eff2fd/2377298125/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPENEX05N_digital_email_20161207_TYBarbs_n-all&source=WPENEX05N_digital_email_20161207_TYBarbs_n-all")
---

| | Peter,

Thirty years ago, EMILY's List had our first win: Barbara Mikulski from Maryland became the first Democratic woman elected to the Senate in her own right.

Six years later in the Year of the Woman, Barbara Boxer joined her from California.

These two pro-choice champions are both retiring from the Senate in January, so we're putting together a Thank You Card to tell them how much we appreciate their decades of service.

**[Thank Senators Mikulski and Boxer for always fighting for women and families-- add your name (and a note if you'd like!) to our Thank You Card. ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76bc/24c69fd9/2cb283e/18eff2fe/2377298125/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161207_email_ThankYouBarbaras?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Thank+Senators+Mikulski+and+Boxer+for+al&utm_campaign=WPENEX05N_digital_email_20161207_TYBarbs_n-all&source=WPENEX05N_digital_email_20161207_TYBarbs_n-all")** [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76bc/24c69fd9/2cb283e/18eff2ff/2377298125/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161207_email_ThankYouBarbaras?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WPENEX05N_digital_email_20161207_TYBarbs_n-all&source=WPENEX05N_digital_email_20161207_TYBarbs_n-all") Barbara Mikulski took it upon herself to welcome and mentor new women senators who came after her, earning the nickname the "Dean of Senate Women." As a senator, she fought to have women included in clinical trials and medical research, and she introduced the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act that President Obama signed into law in 2009.

Barbara Boxer made the leap from the House to the Senate after she led a group of House women to demand that Anita Hill's allegations of sexual harassment against Clarence Thomas be taken seriously by the all-white, all-male panel of senators who heard Anita's testimony. Barbara's also been a champion for the environment, securing $1.3 billion to protect water resources despite a veto from President George W. Bush.

We've been so proud to have these women fighting in the Senate for an incredible combined 54 years.

And while they may be leaving the Senate, I know they'll never stop fighting to make life better for women and families in this country.

**Join me and add your name to our Thank You Card to Senators Barbara Mikulski and Barbara Boxer:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Thank-You-Barbara-And-Barbara](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76bc/24c69fd9/2cb283e/18eff2f8/2377298125/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161207_email_ThankYouBarbaras?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgThankYouBarbaraA&utm_campaign=WPENEX05N_digital_email_20161207_TYBarbs_n-all&source=WPENEX05N_digital_email_20161207_TYBarbs_n-all")**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76bc/24c69fd9/2cb283e/18eff2f9/2377298125/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WPENEX05N_digital_email_20161207_TYBarbs_n-all&source=WPENEX05N_digital_email_20161207_TYBarbs_n-all")
